title: Cash Flow Modeling: The net operating income (NOI) is calculated before deducting mortgage...
summary: Calculate NOI by subtracting operating expenses from rental income.
prompt: The net operating income (NOI) is calculated before deducting mortgage payments.
solution: NOI is a key performance indicator for real estate investments, calculated by subtracting operating expenses from rental income. It does not include mortgage payments, making it a useful measure of property profitability.
